commands.review_summary:
Adds a gateway-owned `on-exit` cron schedule that persists a watched shell command and wakes the originating session when the command exits.

PR surface: Source +376, Tests +427, Docs +29. Total +832 across 27 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Deterministic source-level reproductions are available by delaying `spawn()` and removing the job, updating command or cwd under the same ID, or rejecting `persistCompletion()` and restarting with the still-enabled stored job.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The author should repair the three concrete lifecycle defects; maintainers must then decide whether persistent gateway-owned shell execution is an acceptable permanent cron contract.
